summary: Iteration 162 - Verified Mira chat NameError fixes and loop breaking behavior. All 12 tests passed. The fixes for 'history' and 'current_pillar' NameErrors are working correctly. Conversational loop detection triggers handoff when user confirms after 3+ questions.
critical_code_review_comments: NameError fix for 'history' variable confirmed working - request.history is correctly used
NameError fix for 'current_pillar' variable confirmed working - 'pillar' variable is correctly used
Loop detection logic correctly identifies affirmative confirmations (yes please go ahead, yes, ok, etc.)
Unified Flow creates: Admin Notification → Service Desk Ticket → Channel Intake for Mira requests
Export endpoint /api/admin/export/products-with-tags returns proper CSV with headers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira chat NameError fixes verified. Loop breaking works when user confirms after 3+ questions. Unified Flow creates notifications and tickets correctly.

details.basic_message: PASS - No 500 error, returns valid response

details.service_desk_tickets: PASS - Tickets created with IDs like REQ-20260201-0123

details.json_format: PASS - Returns JSON with products array and total_products count

verified_fixes.issue: Conversational loop not breaking on user confirmation
verified_fixes.fix: Improved loop detection to force handoff when user confirms after 3+ questions
